case_title: ERIC LURIO VS. GREEN TORTOISE ADVENTURE TRAVEL, INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN TORTOISE ADVENTURE TRAVEL, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LURIO, ERIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREEN TORTOISE ADVENTURE TRAVEL, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
